case_title: MENDEZ, DAVID G. VS JOYNER, TERESA F.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOYNER, TERESA F.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,845.25 FILED BY MENDEZ, DAVID G. AS TO DEFENDANT JOYNER, TERESA F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, DAVID G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOYNER, TERESA F. $2,845.25 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,895.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOYNER, TERESA F. HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-03-1997, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, DAVID G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOYNER, TERESA F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
